title: Inaugural Lexpert Special Edition: Insolvency and Restructuring recognizes 21 McCarthy Tétrault lawyers
content:
## Inaugural Lexpert Special Edition: Insolvency and Restructuring recognizes 21 McCarthy Tétrault lawyers
Lexpert has included 21 McCarthy Tétrault lawyers in its inaugural Special Edition: Insolvency and Restructuring .
Those featured in the publication are current Lexpert -ranked lawyers already recognized for their expertise in corporate tax, banking and financial institutions, corporate commercial law and corporate commercial litigation as it pertains to insolvency and restructuring mandates.
The McCarthy Tétrault lawyers featured in the 2024 publication are:
Such a strong showing from our lawyers in this new list highlights the excellent work they’re doing for clients in this high-stakes and challenging space.
McCarthy Tétrault extends its congratulations to everyone listed.
McCarthy Tétrault’s national Bankruptcy and Restructuring group benefits from the combined interdisciplinary expertise of practitioners experienced in every aspect of the insolvency process. From the strategic use of provisions in the Companies’ Creditors Arrangement Act and the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act to guiding debtors, creditors, trustees, receivers and court appointed monitors on sensitive cross-border issues, our award-winning and rating-agency-recognized professionals are intimately acquainted with an organization’s most nuanced needs. We provide clear and timely insights to stay ahead of arising problems, and more than 20 years of experience has made our advisors veterans among bankruptcy and restructuring professionals throughout Canada and North America. To learn more about our Bankruptcy and Restructuring group, visit us here .
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
